# WebsitesWW.com - Web Design & Development Agency

## Project Overview
- **Type**: Static HTML/CSS/JS website
- **Purpose**: Business website for a local web design agency
- **Domain**: WebsitesWW.com
- **Focus**: SEO-optimized, mobile-responsive, fast-loading

## Tech Stack
- HTML5 (semantic)
- CSS3 (custom properties, flexbox, grid)
- Vanilla JavaScript
- No frameworks or build tools needed

## SEO Guidelines
- Use semantic HTML elements
- Include proper meta tags and Open Graph tags
- Add JSON-LD structured data (LocalBusiness schema)
- Optimize for Core Web Vitals
- Use descriptive alt text for images
